The Btrust Open-Source Cohort offers long-term support to established Bitcoin open-source contributors, promoting a collaborative environment for sustained development.

Members receive funding paid monthly in bitcoin, mentorship, and peer support to deepen their work on critical

Applications for Btrust developer grants are open year-round, with new grantees announced quarterly.

If you’re a developer looking to contribute to Bitcoin open source projects, we encourage you to apply.

The Women in Tech accelerator program is designed to help women-owned businesses that leverage on technology, to sharpen their business skills, receive mentorship and access financial support to scale.

Applications for Cohort 9 are now open.
Register now: 
womenintech.ke
It's here. The Women in Tech Accelerator is officially open for applications in the UAE, continuing support for women entrepreneurs.

The Women in Tech Accelerator will soon open for its 2026 cohort across Africa, the Middle East, and Pakistan. If you’re a woman-led, tech-enabled, impact-driven startup, stay tuned for the call for applications!
